title: Gray
description: PVP-focused overlay pack for lokamc. Various tweaks were given to show the diffrence between kb2 swords and non kb2 swords and better fps
body:
**Gray**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- PVP-focused overlay pack for knockback 2 swords. Various tweaks were given to show the diffrence between kb2 swords and non kb2 swords ---
**What the pack looks like** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XiFDoxet/images/f287b3854286db774f8bdd7b9314eedbf85923c5.png)
--- for more detail This texture pack is built to make PvP on Loka feel cleaner, faster, and easier to read. The main highlight is the sword color-changing feature for no knockback and Knockback 2. Instead of guessing which sword you grabbed in the middle of a fight, the color instantly tells you, which helps a ton during quick swaps or when juggling gear. It adds personality to your loadout while giving a real gameplay advantage. Along with the enchant-color system, the pack includes a bunch of small quality-of-life tweaks. The totem is smaller so it doesn’t block half your screen, and your hands stay small unless you're holding tools, weapons, or blocks, which makes everything look cleaner in first-person. Overall, Gray is perfect if you want a PvP-focused overlay pack that helps you instantly recognize KB2 swords, keeps your screen clean, and feels great to play with on Loka or any PvP server. have any questions? need help? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!**
